payload.description: Easily automate the translation of your documentation into multiple languages, powered by Azure AI Services
This repository contains examples and sample code to help customers get started with using Amazon Neptune in Generative AI applications.

Dropp is a framework-agnostic media management toolkit for Node.js that simplifies uploads, storage, and file lifecycle. With a clean API for attaching, replacing, and managing images, audio, and documents, it removes the complexity of handling media so you can build faster.
Shopware 6 is an open commerce platform based on Symfony Framework and Vue and supported by a worldwide community and more than 3.100 community extensions
